title: Marlierea skortzoviana

The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Marlierea skortzoviana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which have been identified as responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Marlierea skortzoviana is often used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
